name: GitHub Copilot
description: Imports Pi GitHub Copilot OAuth credentials for Pi's built-in github-copilot provider.

env.description: Optional fallback path to a Pi auth.json containing the github-copilot OAuth entry when the plugin .data auth.json is not present.

settings.label: GitHub Copilot auth.json path
settings.description: Path to a Pi auth.json file containing github-copilot OAuth credentials. Relative .data paths are resolved inside this plugin's data folder.
